zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Throckmorton於1382年出生在英國武斯特斯爾福拉德波利時，他的父親Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol43歲，母親Agnes Besford32歲。他於1409年6月25日與Lady Alianore de la Spine在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1445年4月12日在他的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾福拉德波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Throckmorton于1382年出生在英国武斯特斯爾福拉德波利时，他的父亲Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol43岁，母亲Agnes Besford32岁。他于1409年6月25日与Lady Alianore de la Spine在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1445年4月12日在他的家乡享年63岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾福拉德波利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Throckmorton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Throckmorton in Worcestershire, which is named with Old English throc ‘beam bridge’ + mere ‘pool’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

History: The Throckmorton family was powerful and influential in England in Tudor times, but has since almost died out there. American bearers of the name trace their descent from either John Throckmorton (1601–1684) of New England or Robert Throckmorton (1609–1663) of VA.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Throckmorton was born in 1382, in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England, his father, Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol, was 43 and his mother, Agnes Besford, was 32. He married Lady Alianore de la Spine on 25 June 1409, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 12 April 1445, in his hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Throckmorton est né en 1382, à Fladbury, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Agnes Besford, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alianore de la Spine le 25 juin 1409, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 12 avril 1445, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Fladbury, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Throckmorton 1382 in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol 43 und seine Mutter Agnes Besford 32. Er hat am 25. Juni 1409 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England Lady Alianore de la Spine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 12. April 1445 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Throckmorton è nato il nel 1382 nel Fladbury, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Besford, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alianore de la Spine il 25 giugno 1409, nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 12 aprile 1445, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Fladbury, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Throckmortonが1382年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフラドブリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Polは43歳，母Agnes Besfordは32歳であった。1409年6月25日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンでLady Alianore de la Spineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1445年4月12日に故郷で63歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフラドブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Throckmorton(이)가 1382년 영국 워스스터실르 플라드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Besford(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1409년 6월 25일 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 Lady Alianore de la Spine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1445년 4월 12일 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 플라드버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Throckmorton nasceu em 1382, em Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Besford, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alianore de la Spine em 25 de junho de 1409, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de abril de 1445, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Throckmorton родился в 1382 г. в местности фладбури, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Besford, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alianore de la Spine 25 июня 1409 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 12 апреля 1445 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности фладбури, ворсестиршир, Англия.

sm.from 1416 to 1422: mai le 1416 e o'o I le 1422

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Throckmorton nació en 1382, en Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Agnes Besford, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Lady Alianore de la Spine el 25 de junio de 1409, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 12 de abril de 1445, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
